search_document:
User Request: Most expensive products.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Most Expensive Products
Type: table
Description: List of products sorted by unit price
Title: Product Categories Distribution
Type: pie_chart
Description: Distribution of most expensive products by category
Title: Total Value of Most Expensive Products
Type: kpi
Description: Total value of the top N most expensive products

dashboard_layout.title: Total Value of Most Expensive Products

sql_queries.title: Most Expensive Products
sql_queries.description: List of products sorted by unit price
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitPrice FROM Products ORDER BY UnitPrice DESC

sql_queries.title: Product Categories Distribution
sql_queries.description: Distribution of most expensive products by category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName ORDER BY ProductCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Value of Most Expensive Products
sql_queries.description: Total value of the top N most expensive products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(UnitPrice * UnitsInStock) AS TotalValue FROM (SELECT UnitPrice, UnitsInStock FROM Products ORDER BY UnitPrice DESC LIMIT 10)
